FreeAgent:

My First Cappuccino App

Posted on 04 September 2009 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: Programming Cappuccino Videos Cocoa
I haven't written anything in such a long time. I'm rather busy at the moment but there's one thing I'd like to share with you: My fondness of Cappuccino. So without further ado, here's a short clip of me showing off my first Cappuccino app with Google Maps and a Rails backend:
